articles.title_en: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
articles.title_zh: 数据中心、AI与能源的最新动态
articles.summary_en: The Verge: Senators Warren and Hawley pressed the EIA for mandatory annual energy-use disclosures from data centers. The EIA launched a voluntary pilot in four U.S. regions. This follows major tech giants signing Trump's Ratepayer Protection Pledge to self-fund power for AI data centers.
articles.summary_zh: The Verge：两党参议员沃伦与霍利联名致信能源信息署，要求强制数据中心每年披露能源使用数据；EIA同步启动四地区自愿试点。此前谷歌、Meta等已签署特朗普的电费保护承诺，承诺自建AI数据中心供电设施。

articles.title_en: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon's ban
articles.title_zh: 法院支持Anthropic，暂时阻止五角大楼的禁令
articles.summary_en: The Verge: A federal judge granted Anthropic a temporary injunction blocking the Pentagon's supply-chain-based ban on its products. The ruling is a significant legal win for Anthropic against the Defense Department's exclusion order.
articles.summary_zh: The Verge：联邦法官裁定支持Anthropic申请，暂时阻止五角大楼以供应链安全为由对Anthropic产品实施的禁令，这是Anthropic对抗国防部排除令的重要法律胜利。

articles.title_en: David Sacks is no longer the White House AI and Crypto Czar
articles.title_zh: 戴维·萨克斯不再担任白宫AI与加密货币专员
articles.summary_en: The Verge: David Sacks has stepped down as the White House AI and Crypto Czar, ending his tenure overseeing the Trump administration's technology policy.
articles.summary_zh: The Verge：戴维·萨克斯辞去白宫AI与加密货币专员职务，结束其监管特朗普政府科技政策议程的任期。

articles.title_en: Google is making it easier to import another AI's memory into Gemini
articles.title_zh: 谷歌让用户更轻松地将其他AI记忆导入Gemini
articles.summary_en: The Verge: Google is adding a feature for Gemini to import chat history and memory from competing AI assistants, reducing friction for users switching to Gemini.
articles.summary_zh: The Verge：谷歌为Gemini新增从其他AI助手导入聊天记录和记忆的功能，降低用户从竞品切换至Gemini的迁移成本。

articles.title_en: Apple will reportedly allow other AI chatbots to plug into Siri
articles.title_zh: 据报道苹果将允许其他AI聊天机器人接入Siri
articles.summary_en: The Verge: Apple reportedly plans to let third-party AI chatbots integrate with Siri in iOS 27, potentially including ChatGPT, Claude, and others, opening its voice assistant platform to external models.
articles.summary_zh: The Verge：据报道苹果计划在iOS 27中允许第三方AI聊天机器人接入Siri，潜在接入对象包括ChatGPT和Claude等，向外部模型开放语音助手平台。

articles.title_en: Google's 'live' AI search assistant can handle conversations in dozens more languages
articles.title_zh: 谷歌实时AI搜索助手新增支持数十种语言
articles.summary_en: The Verge: Google is expanding its AI-powered live search assistant to dozens of additional languages, broadening global access to real-time conversational search.
articles.summary_zh: The Verge：谷歌将AI实时搜索助手扩展至数十种新语言，在全球范围内进一步普及实时对话式搜索功能。

articles.title_en: Meta gets ready to launch two new Ray-Ban AI glasses
articles.title_zh: Meta准备推出两款新款Ray-Ban AI眼镜
articles.summary_en: The Verge: Meta is preparing to launch two new AI-powered Ray-Ban smart glasses models, expanding its wearable AI lineup ahead of an anticipated full AR glasses release.
articles.summary_zh: The Verge：Meta准备发布两款新款AI功能Ray-Ban智能眼镜，在全功能AR眼镜正式推出前进一步扩充可穿戴AI产品线。

articles.title_en: Approaching.AI Launches ATaaS: High-Efficiency AI Token Production Service Platform
articles.title_zh: 趋境科技发布ATaaS：全球领先的高效能AI Token生产服务平台
articles.summary_en: 量子位: Chinese AI infrastructure company Approaching.AI launched ATaaS (AI Token as a Service), addressing the gap between hardware investment and actual token output efficiency. The platform integrates four proprietary modules covering heterogeneous compute, intelligent scheduling, and elastic scaling for cost-effective token production.
articles.summary_zh: 量子位：国内AI基础设施厂商趋境科技正式发布ATaaS高效能AI Token生产服务平台，针对硬件高投入难以转化为优质Token产能的行业痛点，依托四大自研技术模块实现异构算力整合、智能调度与弹性扩容，为国产算力规模化降本增效提供解决方案。
